description: This Java class 'NotificationService' manages notification workflows for business loan application events, including submission, decision production, and decision override. It handles sending emails and SMS notifications, with fallback logging on failures, and supports optional officer notifications.

classes.name: NotificationService
classes.description: A service class that orchestrates sending notifications for key business events related to loan applications, including submission and decision updates.

methods.name: onApplicationSubmitted
methods.description: Triggers notification emails/SMS when a loan application is submitted.

methods.name: onDecisionProduced
methods.description: Triggers notification when an automated decision is produced for an application.

methods.name: onDecisionOverridden
methods.description: Triggers notification when a decision is overridden by a loan officer.

methods.name: sendBestEffort
methods.description: Attempts to send notifications via email and SMS to applicant and officers, with error handling and logging.

methods.name: buildSubmissionBody
methods.description: Constructs the notification message body for application submission.

methods.name: buildDecisionBody
methods.description: Constructs the notification message body for decision updates, including reasons and timestamps.

methods.name: safe
methods.description: Safely returns a trimmed string, replacing null with empty string.

methods.name: truncate
methods.description: Truncates a string to a maximum length, appending ellipsis if needed.
